TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Naihunpu, title = Naihunpu, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Naihunpu} }

S.FORM: Naihunpu Itiniay i Xinyi Cen no Nantou ko Naihunpu a niyaro', 656 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 1,803 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 32% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 575 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 68% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 1,228 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Bunun 30%, Paiwan 1%, Tayal 0.5%, Amis 0.5%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko kofa i niyaro'. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'. Ira ko paisingan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: naiħo~u~unpo~u~u itiniaj i xinji ʦən no~u nanto~uo~u~u ko~u naiħo~u~unpo~u~u a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *,*** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un **%, paiwan *%, tajaɾ *.*%, amis *.*%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u ko~ufa i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u paisiŋan i nijaro~uʡ.
S.FORM: Naihunpu Itiniay i Xinyi Cen no Nantou ko Naihunpu a niyaro', 656 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 1,803 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 32% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 575 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 68% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 1,228 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Bunun 30%, Paiwan 1%, Tayal 0.5%, Amis 0.5%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko kofa i niyaro'. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'. Ira ko paisingan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: naiħo~u~unpo~u~u itiniaj i xinji ʦən no~u nanto~uo~u~u ko~u naiħo~u~unpo~u~u a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *,*** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un **%, paiwan *%, tajaɾ *.*%, amis *.*%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u ko~ufa i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u paisiŋan i nijaro~uʡ.
